requirement_topic.en: Dangerous Goods Transport — UN 38.3 and Mozambique routing
requirement_topic.zh: 危险货物运输——UN 38.3与莫桑比克线路
requirement_topic.zht: 危險貨物運輸——UN 38.3與莫桑比克路線

summary.en: Lithium batteries are dangerous goods for transport and Mozambique shipments must follow international transport requirements. The core evidence is a valid UN 38.3 test summary and product documentation matching the shipped model. Exporters should prepare IATA/ICAO compliant air packages or IMDG compliant sea documentation as applicable. Mozambique entry commonly uses Maputo, Beira, or Nacala as maritime arrival points, and the dangerous-goods declaration must align with each carrier and destination leg documentation requirements.
summary.zh: 锂电池属于危险货物，运往莫桑比克必须遵守国际运输要求。核心证据是与出货型号一致的有效UN 38.3测试摘要和产品文件。出口商应按线路准备IATA/ICAO空运文件或IMDG海运文件。莫桑比克常见海运到港为马普托、贝拉或纳卡拉，危险品申报应与承运人及目的地环节文件要求匹配。
summary.zht: 鋰電池屬於危險品，運往莫桑比克必須遵守國際運輸要求。核心證據是與出貨型號一致的有效UN 38.3測試摘要和產品文件。出口商應按路線準備IATA/ICAO空運文件或IMDG海運文件。莫桑比克常見海運到港為馬普托、貝拉或納卡拉，危險品申報應與承運人及目的地環節文件要求匹配。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, sub-section 38.3 (UN 38.3)
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations and ICAO Technical Instructions for air transport
IMDG Code for sea transport to Maputo, Beira, or Nacala

summary.en: China exports lithium batteries on the same UN 38.3 foundation for dangerous-goods transport. Chinese exporters usually already maintain UN 38.3 test summaries and dangerous-goods declarations for carrier submission, so these materials can generally be reused for Mozambique, subject to consignee and route alignment. Local destination checks at Mozambican ports may still require paperwork and labelling adjustments.
summary.zh: 中国对锂电池出口同样以UN 38.3为基础执行危险品运输。中国出口商通常已具备UN 38.3测试摘要及承运人危险品申报材料，因此一般可复用于莫桑比克，但需与收货方和路线对齐。莫桑比克入港时可能仍有标签与文件补充要求。
summary.zht: 中國對鋰電池出口同樣以UN 38.3為基礎執行危險品運輸。中國出口商通常已具備UN 38.3測試摘要及承運人危險品申報材料，因此一般可複用於莫桑比克，但需與收貨方和路線對齊。莫桑比克入港時可能仍有標籤與文件補充要求。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 test summary for export transport from China
Chinese dangerous-goods export and dangerous-goods declaration practices

gap.en: UN 38.3 itself is internationally consistent, so technical transport baseline overlap is strong. The main gaps are documentary alignment for actual carriers, dangerous-goods class labels, state of charge statements, and port-specific acceptance in Mozambique. Exporters should verify current handling requirements at the declared entry port: Maputo, Beira, or Nacala.
gap.zh: UN 38.3在国际上具有一致性，因此运输技术基线重合度较高。主要差距在于对应承运人文件、危险品标签、荷电状态声明及莫桑比克入境口岸的港口要求（马普托、贝拉、纳卡拉）。
gap.zht: UN 38.3在國際上具有一致性，因此運輸技術基線重合度較高。主要差距在於對應承運人文件、危險品標籤、荷電狀態聲明及莫桑比克入境港口的港口要求（馬普托、貝拉、納卡拉）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for transport — UN 38.3 and mode-specific dangerous-goods documentation (air or sea) are required for lithium battery consignments to Mozambique
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for transport from China exports — UN 38.3 test summary and dangerous-goods declarations

source.publisher: UNECE — UN Manual of Tests and Criteria (UN 38.3)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mozambique transport readiness is usually strongest where Chinese exporters already hold a current UN 38.3 basis; remaining work is route-level documentation and destination acceptance at Maputo, Beira, or Nacala with correct Class 9 marking and dangerous-goods records.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 莫桑比克运输端通常可复用中国已具备的UN 38.3基线，但仍需补齐具体航线文件，并确保在马普托、贝拉或纳卡拉入境时正确执行第9类标识和危险品记录。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 莫桑比克運輸端通常可複用中國已具備的UN 38.3基線，但仍需補齊具體航線文件，並確保在馬普托、貝拉或納卡拉入境時正確執行第9類標識和危險品記錄。
